summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of NEW Beispiele menu with 5 interactive example pages. All features working correctly: collapsible menu, badge count, all 5 pages render with correct components, active state highlighting, navigation between pages, theme switching, and no regression on existing Tools menu or Dashboard overview.
passed_tests: Dashboard sidebar 'Beispiele' toggle button visible (data-testid='sidebar-beispiele-toggle') - PASS
Beispiele badge shows '5' correctly - PASS
Beispiele dropdown EXPANDS correctly - links become visible - PASS
Beispiele dropdown COLLAPSES correctly - links become hidden - PASS
/dashboard/beispiele/vergleich renders Fahrzeug-Vergleich with radar chart and specs table - PASS
Vehicle selectors (select-vehicle-0-0 etc.) present on Vergleich page - PASS
/dashboard/beispiele/preis-tracker renders Preis-Tracker with 4 tracker cards (tracker-card-0..3) - PASS
Area charts and line charts render on Preis-Tracker page - PASS
/dashboard/beispiele/flotte renders Flotten-Übersicht with 4 KPI cards (fleet-kpi-0..3) - PASS
Fleet vehicle cards (fleet-vehicle-F-001..F-006) all present - PASS
Cost bar chart and status pie chart render on Flotte page - PASS
/dashboard/beispiele/markt-report renders Markt-Report with 4 key findings (finding-0..3) - PASS
Region table with 6 rows (region-row-0..5) present - PASS
Download PDF and Share buttons present on Markt-Report - PASS
Brand share donut chart and segment price trends area chart render - PASS
/dashboard/beispiele/tuning-showcase renders Tuning Showcase with 4 vehicle selectors (showcase-select-0..3) - PASS
Stage cards (stage-card-0..2) with animated gauge bars present - PASS
Bar chart for performance comparison renders - PASS
Active state highlighting works - cyan (#00E5FF) background on active Beispiele link - PASS
Navigation between all 5 Beispiele pages works correctly - PASS
Theme switching (Dark/Light/Gradient) works on Beispiele pages - PASS
Tools menu still works (no regression) - dropdown expands, badge shows '7' - PASS
Tool navigation works - /dashboard/tools/deal-analyzer renders correctly - PASS
Dashboard overview still works (no regression) - 'Automotive Dashboard' title present - PASS
Return to Dashboard Overview from Beispiele pages works - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: beispielNav array in DashboardSidebar.jsx correctly defines all 5 example pages with proper routes and accent colors
AnimatePresence used for smooth expand/collapse animation on Beispiele dropdown (same pattern as Tools)
All 5 Beispiele components are native dashboard components using Recharts and Framer Motion
Active state highlighting uses inline styles with item.color for proper theming
All required data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
themeUtils.js properly used for consistent styling across all Beispiele pages
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required, all data is mocked
seed_data_creation: N/A - all vehicle/fleet/market data is hardcoded in component files
context_for_next_testing_agent: Beispiele menu fully implemented and tested. 5 example pages available: Fahrzeug-Vergleich (vehicle comparison with radar chart), Preis-Tracker (price tracking with area/line charts), Flotten-Übersicht (fleet overview with bar/pie charts and vehicle cards), Markt-Report (market report with area chart, donut chart, and region table), Tuning Showcase (tuning stages with animated gauge bars and bar chart). All routes under /dashboard/beispiele/*. Beispiele dropdown uses AnimatePresence for animations (same as Tools). Active links highlighted with their accent color (#00E5FF cyan or #CCFF00 lime). Theme switching (dark/light/gradient) works on all pages. All data is MOCKED/static in component files.
